channel.title: mszalewicz
channel.description: Backend engineering using Go and Elixir. Distributed systems, web architecture, internals of modern web technologies and high-performance software systems.

item.title: Frosk - local first password manager
item.description: Building a local-first password manager with Go's standard library and minimal dependencies.

item.title: Iterating over local IP addresses in Go
item.description: Implementation of local IP traverse in Go.

item.title: SQLite Pitfalls
item.description: A deep dive into common mistakes when using SQLite.
